Edit: Good to know the Dunning-Kruger effect is alive and well in the replies. Calling me dumb without spending two seconds to google how fast premeditation forms is hilarious. Premeditation doesn't require a 10-page plan; it just requires a "cooling-off period" and a "sustained choice of weapon”. When the dog went inside, the threat was gone. Instead of switching to a Taser or pepper spray, the officer chose to keep a firearm drawn. That window of time to rethink makes it legally premeditated. His words are just the cherry on top. @TheDreadfulSkeleton ❤️ 59
I really can't believe he's just this gorgeous! I knew my Knight of Shining Armour would finally return but I didn't expect it to be in such a wonderful form! His sleek frame, his chiselled features, it's like the Gods carved him out of the finest steel ever crafted and imbued it with the most charming personality ever invented! I often envision myself in his strong, careful arms as he hovers away into the sky, getting lost in the beauty of the stars, but trailing back to the true supernova hunk! He probably looks away embarrassed, but then gives a strong smile back, and that's when I feel the true shocking electric jolt in my heart that keeps me alive even when I thought I was dead! All wrapped up in the most amazing gameplay ever that I instantly click with, it's like we were destined to be together!

ROBLOX ANIMAL HOSPITAL..
Foltyn

ROBLOX ANIMAL HOSPITAL..

更新於: 2026-06-29 10:00 ▶ 原片
@bryansoon8113 ❤️ 357
Here are some tips:

There will always be no anomalies during the first shift. The first patient will always need herbs, while the 2nd patient always needs eye drops.

When drinking coffee, always drink 2 sips. Do not drink 3 sips. This is because it makes the most of the coffee whilst still being effective against the window anomaly (the one that bangs their head against the window).

When barney checks in, always protect him and give him what he wants. When the part where he asks for a photo arrives, do not close the shutters. Once successful, he will give you a 2nd coffee machine. (Barney the goat)

If you accidentally let an anomaly enter, give it the wrong treatment on purpose. This will kill the anomaly.

The fire extinguisher can clear out slimes, fires and hiders quickly.

When blowing out the candles during a ritual event, equip eye drops to prevent sanity loss.

If you let the bed monster catch you while holding maple syrup, it will take the syrup and leave you alone.

Ratthew (the mouse) and Ron (the accountant) are guranteed to not be anomalies. Idk about barney cuz some say he's also an anomaly while others say that he's a serial killer.

During surgeries, the first treatment item will always be iv drops.

Lmk if I made any mistakes and hope this helps :)

@CjGamer-19 ❤️ 9
Here’s some tips the anomaly the bangs his head on the window get coffee an take to sips so you do not waste it and give the last sip to the banging head anomaly and the first person needs hers and the second. Patient needs eye drops. and if you see a monster under the bed, just give it maple syrup and it will leave.
@Notsabrinadti_99 ❤️ 6
Me and my friends play this and it's really good it jumpscares but nit that big



If there are Eyes on the ceiling usé eye drops and always check the cámeras and there photos also if someone starts a ritual usé onitment to put out the candels sometimes check their skin because they might be an anomaly make coffee to make your santy go up make sure to double check if you have the right treatment for the animals
@angelamarson9 ❤️ 4
who loves FOlTYN videos




Man can this comment pls blow up like everyone else
@jsihotang ❤️ 4
I’m not gonna give that many tips cuz quite some comments gave alot of tips but i think these are okay right?

1. You can use the fire extinguisher(idk how to spell it correctly) to eliminate hiders (thin wall anomalies that camo’s with the wall)

2. You can also use the fire extinguisher to clean slime on the floor

3. (This tip has already been mentioned but here is a simplified version of it) save your coffee, atleast save 1/3 sips in case of an anomaly banging the window

4. If you have eyedrops and look up at the eyeballs with red stuff (known as the “don’t look up” anomaly) you can neutralize it, you might lose a few sanity points tho..

5. Weird looking patients aren’t anomalies, especially ratthew and ron! Ratthew is the black rat, he’s a good guy! And Ron from accounting is also innocent, they are guaranteed to not have skinwalkers, and check the security camera’s to identify anomalies, sometimes they aren’t seen in the photo/sight.

6.if the photo is different from the animal, its a skinwalker, you need to pay attention to every detail about them! If their ears/eyes are different, shut the shutters! Also if their photo is static, shut the shutters too!

If you need any help i’m not sure if i can help you since i can’t chat and i’m in roblox kids, i’m not even sure if you will see this comment😔my tips aren’t better than others but, its okay right?

旅行の準備して
→東京観光（秋葉原・渋谷・新宿あたり）して
→富士山行って
→コンビニへ行ったり
→ガチャガチャやったり
→大阪観光もして
→桜並木でおにぎり食べて体力回復して
→自動販売機で何か買って
→焼肉食べて
→お祭りの出店で沢山食べ物買って
→温泉（露天風呂）入って
→浴衣で花火して
→旅館に戻って蚊取り線香焚いて、扇風機回して、みんなで寝る

楽しい想い出いっぱいだね！

이번 활동도 다치지 말고 아프지 말고 잘 마무리하자! 내 자랑스러운 아이돌 에이티즈 최고야❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥
@lisjp6333 ❤️ 128
there's really nobody who does it like ateez. being an atiny for over six years, i'm never ever disappointed. they just keep doing wonderful music while also exploring unique concepts. it's always a piece of art whenever they make something.
@mochibaby6784 ❤️ 124
One thing that stayed with me after watching ateez with Epik High was Hongjoong's honesty. He admitted that trying a new musical direction can be scary. They know some fans might love it, while others might miss their previous sound. Even so, they choose to keep growing instead of staying in their comfort zone.

Tablo also shared something that really made me think. If artists never change, people say every song sounds the same. But when they do change, people often say they preferred the old style. That's the challenge every artist faces.

It's okay if this comeback isn't your favorite. It's okay to have your own preferences. But I hope we can still respect the members' hard work and support them with kindness. Every era won't be for everyone, and that's completely normal.

Let's trust that ateez are creating the music they truly believe in. As time passes, we may look back at this era with a different perspective. Until then, let's keep supporting all eight members with love, respect, and trust.

I’m so happy Chase Infiniti got to be in an mv of her fav group!!! 🎉

34. Flower Man (DELTARUNE Chapter 5 Soundtrack) - Toby Fox
Toby Fox

34. Flower Man (DELTARUNE Chapter 5 Soundtrack) - Toby Fox

更新於: 2026-06-29 10:00 ▶ 原片
@Goomba3 ❤️ 5.8k
The fact that Toby decided not to make flowery a wolf in sheep’s clothing but a hero who had to fight not out of hate for the protagonist but because of the complex situation between the worlds is one of the reasons why this is my favorite chapter so far.
@exi_m7074 ❤️ 5.4k
* You're filled with the power of not knowing what a Jarona is.
@thegreatjman1999 ❤️ 4.6k
"yes! we're supposed to fight together!"

The seven human flowers:
@pyguyofdoom182 ❤️ 3.7k
What I appreciate about flowery is that he is a true subversion of flowey.

He is deceitful, he cheats, he is smart as a whip and knows the deal with the prophecy, he can mess with the world as he knows it, he is a clear antagonist.

but.

He is also kind, brave, and selfless. When he tries to keep Asgore in the dark world it is because he is attempting to break with the prophecy. He understands that he is going up against fate itself but still wants a crack at it.

He is not even a human. Much like flowey he likely lacks a soul, but unlike flowey who was created as a sort of freak accident, flowery was given love and attention by Asgore for years. He was raised in a way by Asgore to be good.

And he went out like a damn hero.
@AutumnCarnivine ❤️ 2.7k
“We watched his money run out, and we could do nothing”

God damn
@ShinyScarfy ❤️ 2.7k
Toby really outdid himself on this chapter, the flowers intentionally focused on much more human traits than the other chapter leads, which hits so much harder when they're the only ones we can't save
@magentajewel ❤️ 2.7k
I love how there isn't really a villain of Chapter 5. Flowery feels very much like the "hero of his own story" -- he has his own found-family of misfit weirdos he's trying to protect, he has so many "power of hope and friendship" moments towards the end of the chapter, and he even has the ability to affect our characters' mercy bars. He feels like someone who, under different circumstances, maybe could have been a friend or ally to our heroes, but is forced into inevitable conflict with them by the contrivances of fate, which adds to the moroseness of the fate which befalls him and the other flowers.
@Lyrune ❤️ 2.6k
Flowery spawning the Floradinns to force the Knight into a battle (which they then couldn't leave, because running from battles literally isn'T A mechanic) was some JoJo level outsmarting! 11/10.
You've earned my respect Flowery, rest in peace.
@Redactedtimes ❤️ 2.5k
People are talking about Flowery being the flower man, but the lyrics to the song made me think it’s called that because he’s so dedicated to Asgore that his theme song is named after him too. The flower man who gave them years of dedication. The one who gave them a lifetime of love. This song goes out to him from all of them.
@crackb0ne ❤️ 2.3k
the fact that he is this fucking strong cause he was cherished and treated with love and care despite the awful shitty situation Asgore was in. Not a lightner, not a darkner, but a good listener.
@hackrdonut8194 ❤️ 2.1k
I absolutely adore that Flowey’s character revolved around “love” (levels of violence) while Flowery’s character actually revolves around love.
@CherryCerise-l2q ❤️ 2.1k
Chapter 3 : Okay yeah, there is no way he's doing something more hype than the roaring knight
Chapter 4 : That was surprising but he is not doing something more hype than a titan
Chapter 5 : There is absolutely no way he's doing something cooler than the humanification of omega flowey
@ShowWithNoName ❤️ 2.1k
It was such a genius move to immediately make the association between flowery and flowey. Now the audience is primed to hate this guy right out the gate, but we learn as the chapter goes on that he truly is the hero of his story.
@leritykay8911 ❤️ 1.7k
What I love about this fight is how... Sincerely it portrays Flowery?
Yes, some of the things he says are corny, or cliche. But they're played completely straight.
"Flowery teaches Seth how tk be confident!"
"Flowery's little sister Orange and cooking partner Green appear!"
"Flowery looks at Seth and Aqua proudly.'

And yes, whil he does talk about "The true power of friendship!", it's genuine. It would have been so easy to make him say like "Kris, you will never defeat our Super Neo Kawai Omega form!", and in fact the game does make similar anime jokes in the secret boss fight, but for Flowery... The game is completely sincere
@leritykay8911 ❤️ 1.6k
The only chapter boss to not be absuive, or mean to his Darkners.

Titan is... Titan.

Tenna "was feeling left behind", but he still trapped his employees in horrible contracts, verbally abused them, and was overall a bad boss to them

Queen "wanted to help Noelle", but she was a controlling, egotistical ruler who controlled plugboys with wires, and tormented Swatchlings for entertainment. She even has a resistance fighting against her.

Spade King was an obvious tyrant, throwing everyone in the dungeon, and his subjects don't even like him at all.

Meanwhile... Flowery is genuinely kind and uplifting to every darkner, especially the six flowers. Everyone adores him, and he doesn't let it get to his head. He is uplifting to those around him. Even his jerkyness towards Ralsei was, in his eyes, an attempt to help Ralsei. To help him come out of his shell, to encourage him to defy the rules.

Flowery, along with Gerson, are the only two bosses in the game who will not shatter your soul upon defeat.

I guess he really is living his "Pacifist root"
@Nekrotix12 ❤️ 1.5k
Also cause nobody else is posting it apparently, here’s a transcript of the lyrics:

Ten feet twenty the Flower Man
Is waiting for the touch of his hand
Straightening petals out without a plan
Like the every daily

Wish that bothers the Flower Man
Could I do something to make him laugh
Inside my little chamber made of glass
So he lived the

Flower Man, Flower Man,
With his heart in the sand
So he stands
To watch the whole wide world
From a can

Way up high in the sky
With the sun in his eyes
Ain't it nice
The life forever for
Flowers.

Update: Forgot there was a second part!
Ten feet twenty the Flower Man
Is waiting for the touch of his hand
Fallen to pieces still without a plan
Yet the every daily

Hope that powered the Flower Man
Would never cower off of it's path
Even if broken I am more than glass
So he lived the

Flower Man, Flower Man
With his heart in the sand
So he stands
To watch the whole wide world
From a can

Way up high in the sky
With the sun in your eyes
Ain't it nice
The life forever for
Flowers.
@fitzronovich ❤️ 1.5k
"ok but what if flowey was a bachelor & his boss theme still went insanely hard but in a more traditional sense this time"
@Enderboiiii ❤️ 1.4k
Love how no one commented on how Flowery increased our mercy, potentially hinting at things for the remaining two chapters.
@rainoftime37 ❤️ 1.4k
I'm actually a big fan of Ralsei's extreme dislike for Flowery in this chapter, because what do both Ralsei and Flowery have in common?
They are both heavy references to (but are not the literal embodiments of) the same character: Asriel Dreemurr.

It is very likely that Ralsei saw himself in Flowery, and (as Flowery himself says) was jealous of him. Everything Flowery did went against what Ralsei has taught himself not to do throughout his adventure. "Do not keep too many dark worlds open, the roaring will start". "Do not keep lightners trapped in dark worlds, they have real lives to live". "Do not pretend to be something you're not, you are a darkner meant to help lightners". It's no wonder Ralsei is so angry with him--Flowery is everything Ralsei tries not to be. And yet, he does understand Flowery in the end. Because they have a similar dream, after all: they just want to make lightners happy.
@gumsgang1216 ❤️ 1.4k
It’s amazing, Flowery is introduced as basically a walking joke making fun of those campy over the top romance anime protagonists, and he stays that way for an entire third of the chapter. But by the end he genuinely becomes one of the coolest characters in the entire game, a man who fights for his friends and his dreams just as much as we do. All while keeping the campy, over the top spirit of his characters premise. What an awesome fucking antagonist, easily one of the best in the entire roster for me.
@psychoclops-e6u ❤️ 1.2k
Through the entire chapter, I was expecting Flowery to turn on everyone, to became evil, but in the end, Flower man was an hero, I just couldn't see it
@GuyTheHumanOnYt ❤️ 1.2k
“If only there was a branch where no one had to fight”
“We could call it a pacifist root”
(First time Toby has ever referenced the term pacifist in an undertale context btw)
@mariposa7013 ❤️ 1.2k
The Knight: “toby fox!!! help me!!! give me A cutscene!!! this is base flowery im up against!!!”
@CambriaBold ❤️ 1.0k
"The Flower Man, trapped in asylum" turned out to be far more literal than we ever could've imagined.
@SkyKaiser593 ❤️ 1.0k
Chapter 4: How do we possibly top a fight with a freaking Roaring Titan?!?

Chapter 5: So there's this flower...
@notZabami ❤️ 1.0k
“In this world… It’s Jarona or be Jarona’d” -Flowery the Flower, before flowering all over the place
@seif3399 ❤️ 943
I love how all the flowers just fight you not because they hate you, but because they just wanted to fulfill their dreams and protect their home. And then Flowery just asks the gang why they don't seal the castle town fountain. God, the amount of guilt they try to put on the player themselves is crazy. Literally, Flowery is one of the best written characters in this game.
@mettod99 ❤️ 789

"Knuckles where the fuck are the super emeralds"

nothings stronger than A flowers dream!"
